subject: Demand full refund immediately
escalation_reason: High urgency level (5/5) | Category 'refund_request' requires human handling
body: Your product damaged my equipment. I am demanding a full refund and compensation. This is unacceptable.
ai_response: Bob Martinez is demanding a full refund due to his equipment being damaged by our product. This ticket is being escalated due to its critical urgency and potential revenue loss. The recommended first action is to review the customer's account and assess the situation before responding. Immediate attention is required to address the customer's concerns and prevent further escalation.

subject: Where is my shipment?
body: I ordered 5 days ago and still no tracking update. Order #78432.
ai_response:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out about your order #78432. I understand how concerning it can be to not see any tracking updates after five days. I’m here to help!

I’ve checked the status of your shipment, and it appears that it’s currently in transit but has not yet updated in our system. I recommend checking back in 24-48 hours for tracking updates, as it may take some time for the information to reflect properly.

If you still don't see any updates by then, please let us know, and we’ll be happy to investigate further. Thank you for your patience, and we appreciate your understanding.

Best regards,  
Support Team
